rationale.fidelity: Preserves start-of-window zone slot limits, uncertain later demand and service times, courier-hour capacity, overtime, and the exact margin-net-of-overtime objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains the admission-versus-overtime tension, spatial load mechanism, advance trigger, and capacity-protecting counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed, and the response makes no novelty assertion.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly excludes customer lifetime value and treats loyalty and retention effects as unsupported rather than smuggling them into the objective.
rationale.overall: A nearly ideal framing: precise, managerially concrete, fully bounded, and free of hard failures.
